name: vandelay
description: Art Vandelay's imported skills — importer/exporter of well-architected agents and skills.

plugins.name: art-vandelay
plugins.description: Art Vandelay — importer/exporter of well-architected skills. Reads your environment, imports the skills that fit, and answers in Mermaid + Markdown.

plugins.name: architect
plugins.description: Design a system's architecture and export it as a Mermaid map plus a short doctrine. Art Vandelay's export engine.

plugins.name: judge
plugins.description: Evaluate an existing architecture, design, diff, or module and render a decisive verdict as a Mermaid risk map plus a scored ruling. Art Vandelay's tribunal.

plugins.name: verify
plugins.description: Install and drive real browser-based verification with Playwright — confirm a change actually rendered instead of just reporting it done.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Survey git changes with diff --stat first, group them into logical commits, and write each with a unified template. No agent attribution.
